S.FORM: Bill Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1922 , ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 8, Bill Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2007) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ОІill ОІrown s~Й•raral Д§jaК”ЙЈa s~Й•is~Й•juw na nОІa. kawas~Й• taj **** , rjax s~Й•a taj * nqu taj *, ОІill ОІrown, s~Й•quliq na pК”unro. (mД§uqil s~Й•a kawas~Й• taj ****) КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й•
S.FORM: Bill Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1922 , ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 8, Bill Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2007) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
